attacking_style: Long-range opportunist who attacks from breakaways with 25+ km remaining, capable of sustaining solo efforts on flat to rolling terrain even deep into Grand Tours.
team_tactics: Capitalizes on peloton apathy and mass counter-attacks to infiltrate large breakaways, then attacks again from the break rather than relying on team support.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain suits his ability to sustain long solo efforts; shows exceptional endurance in third-week Grand Tour stages.
vulnerability: Limited data, but reliant on peloton disinterest for breakaway success; unclear how he performs in more controlled or mountainous stages.
key_patterns: Attacks from established breakaways rather than initiating from peloton (1 observation)
Sustains very long solo efforts: 25km alone to stage victory (1 observation)
Maintains strong form deep into Grand Tours, winning multiple stages (1 observation)
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated exceptional late-Tour form with second stage win via 25km solo, showing resilience and power in week three
